translated: Jesus said to him, "Away from me, Satan! For it is written: 'Worship the Lord your God, and serve him only!' "

ref: Jesus told the man to stand up where everyone could see him.
text: Yesu de nɔ nɛ nine gbo ɔ ke: “Tee si nɛ o ba da kpɛti!”

ref: You know you have been taught, “An eye for an eye and a tooth for a tooth.”
text: “Tse nyɛ nu nɛ a de ke: ‘Hɛngmɛ ngɛ hɛngmɛ nane mi,’ ‘lungu ngɛ lungu nane mi.’

text: I ngɛ nyɛ dee ke: Ke nyɛ dami ɔ pa we mlaa tsɔɔli ɔmɛ kɛ Farisifo ɔmɛ a nɔ ɔ, nyɛ be hiɔwe matsɛ yemi ɔ mi sɛe kulaa.” Mukliimifumi he nitsɔɔmi
translated: He said to them: "They said to the master of the house, 'The teacher asks, where is the guest room, where I may eat the Passover with my disciples?'"

text: Nɛ e tsɔ e tsɔli ke a ya tsɛ nihi nɛ a kpee ɔ kɛ ba yo kpeemi ɔ he; se a mi bami.
